fix_suggestion.reason: The root cause of the compilation errors is the use of incorrect ASN.1 generated type names for F1AP protocol extension containers in openair2/F1AP/lib/f1ap_ue_context.c. The compiler explicitly suggests replacing all occurrences of types starting with 'F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_10696Pxx_t' with the correct 'F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_19016Pxx_t' types. This mismatch causes unknown type name errors and subsequent invalid member access errors (e.g., 'list' member not found). The errors occur in multiple functions that encode or decode F1AP messages involving protocol extension containers. Correcting these type names to the compiler-suggested ones will resolve the unknown type errors and fix the invalid structure member accesses.

fix_suggestion.root_cause_analysis: The compilation errors stem from the use of outdated or incorrect ASN.1 generated type names for F1AP protocol extension containers in the source file openair2/F1AP/lib/f1ap_ue_context.c. The compiler explicitly suggests replacing all 'F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_10696Pxx_t' types with 'F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_19016Pxx_t' types. This mismatch causes unknown type errors and invalid member access errors (e.g., accessing 'list' member on an unknown type). The root cause is likely due to an ASN.1 code generation update or a mismatch between the ASN.1 definitions and the source code. Correcting these type names to the compiler-suggested ones aligns the source code with the current ASN.1 generated types, resolving the build errors.
investigation_steps: Review compiler error messages and note all unknown type names and suggested replacements.
Search the source file openair2/F1AP/lib/f1ap_ue_context.c for all occurrences of 'F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_10696Pxx_t' types.
Replace all these occurrences with the corresponding 'F1AP_ProtocolExtensionContainer_19016Pxx_t' types as suggested by the compiler.
Verify that the replaced types are defined in the included ASN.1 generated headers.
Rebuild the project to confirm that the unknown type errors and member access errors are resolved.
If errors persist, verify the ASN.1 code generation process and regenerate the F1AP ASN.1 files to ensure consistency.
fix_suggestion.specification_context: - No 3GPP specification context found (embeddings file missing)
